zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：震荡偏强整理蓄势
zh.content:
当前价格72.19，位于均线上方，短期维持震荡偏强结构。SMA20上行提供支撑，多头仍占优势，高位整理明显，动能趋于平衡。

MACD柱值0.4697为正，短期动能偏多但未明显扩张。RSI未给出，从走势看中性偏强，市场进入整理蓄势阶段，趋势延续但缺乏加速信号。

下方支撑关注71.6与71.2，跌破或回测69.5的SMA20。上方阻力72.3关键，突破后上看73.5区间，需观察放量情况确认突破有效性。

操作以区间为主，未突破72.3前谨慎追多，可在71.2附近低吸。放量突破后顺势跟进并严格止损，防止假突破带来回撤风险。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
SOL/USD continues to trade with a mildly bullish intraday structure, holding above the recent consolidation base near 71.60. Price at 72.19 reflects steady buying pressure after a brief dip, with higher lows forming over the short term. Momentum remains constructive, though not explosive, suggesting a gradual accumulation phase rather than a breakout trend. Market participants appear cautiously optimistic as volatility compresses, recently building.

Short-term momentum is reinforced by price trading above the 20-period SMA at 69.54, confirming a medium-term bullish bias. The MACD reading at 0.4697 indicates positive momentum expansion, although the absence of a signal line limits full crossover confirmation. Overall structure suggests buyers are gradually gaining control, while momentum indicators point to continuation rather than reversal and sustained buying pressure emerge.

Immediate support is established at 71.64, marking the most recent intraday low, while stronger structural support aligns with the 20-period SMA near 69.54. On the upside, resistance is observed at 72.31, followed by a potential extension zone around 73.50 and 75.00. A sustained break above 72.31 could signal continuation momentum, whereas failure to hold 71.60 may invite short-term retracement pressure.

From a trading perspective, bias remains cautiously bullish while price holds above the SMA support region. Dip-buying strategies near 71.60–70.00 may offer favorable risk-reward setups, with confirmation required on stabilization. Upside targets remain 73.50 and 75.00, while protective stops below 69.50 help manage downside risk. A breakdown under this zone would invalidate the current bullish structure. Overall sentiment favors gradual continuation over reversal in the near term.
